title: Came across an interesting project Terminal3m
author: whosjkt
selftext:
Hi all I have been lurking in these threads for a while as I find this whole AI and trading space interesting.

Recently came across a project called Terminal3M and thought it looked pretty different to most of the stuff I normally see online.

From what I understand it’s a cloud-based execution system running on Hyperliquid built by an ex LME trader. Seems more focused on automation, infrastructure and execution logic rather than just selling signals or prediction content.

Anything I should look out for? Or has anyone used it it seems like it’s pretty known as quite a few telegram members

comments.author: Careless-Diamond-277
comments.body: Idk couldnt find any Info about it
